decisions.excludedInterpretation: Do not infer disclosure adequacy or legal compliance.
Do not encode review or learning duties while the official source is blocked.
decisions.followUpSourceRequest: Verify accessible authoritative HQSC policy text.

decisions.excludedInterpretation: Do not treat the national framework as replacing state or territory requirements.
decisions.followUpSourceRequest: Confirm operative date and jurisdictional relationship.

decisions.excludedInterpretation: Do not encode reportability or review thresholds from blocked text.
Secondary-only evidence cannot support a controlling obligation.
decisions.followUpSourceRequest: Replace with a verified primary source or reject.

decisions.excludedInterpretation: Do not invent a local escalation owner or procedure.
decisions.followUpSourceRequest: Name the controlling local procedure or retain unresolved.
